control.description-key: Compact read-only info card with slot-based layout. Bind to table columns or use related field syntax for entity data.

property.name: layout
property.description-key: Card layout. Smart = collapsible header summary with body on tap (best for mobile lists). Contact = full vCard-style block with action buttons. Compact = dense label:value form (closest to a classic form section).

property.name: hideEmptyFields
property.description-key: Hide rows whose value is blank or '---'. Recommended ON for mobile to keep cards tight. Default true.

property.name: showCardBorder
property.description-key: Wrap the card in a border + shadow. Turn off when embedding inside another container that already provides chrome. Default true.

property.name: showVersionInfo
property.description-key: Show a small version badge in the bottom-right. Useful while validating mobile cache refresh; turn off in production.

property.name: startExpanded
property.description-key: Smart layout only. True = body visible on load; false = collapsed to header until tapped. Default true.

property.name: showTitle
property.description-key: Show the title field in the card header. Set to false when the form section header already provides the title. Default true.

property.name: titleField
property.description-key: Main heading. Bind to the record's primary name column (e.g. account.name, msdyn_workorder.msdyn_name). When bound to a lookup column, related-field syntax (@column) on other slots fetches from the lookup target.

property.name: subtitleField1
property.description-key: Shown under title, dot-separated. Bind a column (e.g. jobtitle) or use @column to pull from the title's lookup target (e.g. @msdyn_serviceaccount).

property.name: subtitleField2
property.description-key: Secondary subtitle. Same syntax as Subtitle 1. Tip: use status or category columns here for at-a-glance context.

property.name: subtitleField3
property.description-key: Tertiary subtitle, dot-separated after the others. Use sparingly to avoid header crowding.

property.name: phoneField1
property.description-key: Tap-to-call button. Bind a phone column (e.g. telephone1, mobilephone) or @msdyn_phonenumber from a related work order.

property.name: phoneField2
property.description-key: Secondary tap-to-call button. Common pattern: phoneField1=mobile, phoneField2=@account.telephone1 (office).

property.name: emailField
property.description-key: Tap-to-email button. Bind an email column (e.g. emailaddress1) or @relatedlookup.emailaddress1.

property.name: webField
property.description-key: Tap-to-open URL button. Bind a URL column (e.g. websiteurl).

property.name: addressField
property.description-key: Single-line address row. Bind a composite address column (e.g. address1_composite) or @msdyn_address1 from a related record. Becomes a tappable map link when Latitude/Longitude are also set.

property.name: latitudeField
property.description-key: Latitude for the map link (e.g. address1_latitude, msdyn_latitude). Required alongside Longitude to make Address tappable.

property.name: longitudeField
property.description-key: Longitude for the map link (e.g. address1_longitude, msdyn_longitude). Required alongside Latitude to make Address tappable.

property.name: detailField1
property.description-key: Icon + text info row, ideal for longer narrative columns like instructions or summary (e.g. msdyn_instructions, description).

property.name: detailField2
property.description-key: Icon + text info row. Example: @msdyn_workordersummary on a booking form.

property.name: detailField3
property.description-key: Icon + text info row. Use for any read-only narrative the technician needs at a glance.

property.name: gridField1
property.description-key: Key-value cell in 2-column grid. Best for short scalar values (e.g. starttime, duration, revenue). Label is the column display name.

property.name: gridField2
property.description-key: Key-value cell in 2-column grid (e.g. endtime, numberofemployees).

property.name: gridField3
property.description-key: Key-value cell in 2-column grid (e.g. duration, msdyn_estimatedarrivaltime).

property.name: gridField4
property.description-key: Key-value cell in 2-column grid. Supports @column related-field syntax for cross-entity values.

property.name: gridField5
property.description-key: Key-value cell in 2-column grid.

property.name: gridField6
property.description-key: Key-value cell in 2-column grid.

property.name: tagField1
property.description-key: Compact chip/pill badge. Best for status/category lookups or option sets (e.g. bookingstatus, statuscode, msdyn_priority). Picks up status colour when available.

property.name: tagField2
property.description-key: Compact chip/pill badge (e.g. @msdyn_primaryincidenttype, industrycode).

property.name: tagField3
property.description-key: Compact chip/pill badge (e.g. @msdyn_priority).
